emails.subject: Amendment to License Agreement
emails.body: Tana, Have you heard anything back from Intelligence Press on this amendment? Dexter Steis from Intelligence Press said that were having their lawyer look over it, but I haven't heard anything else. The original agreement expires on Wednesday. Thanks. Julie Forwarded by Julie Ferrara/HOU/ECT on 02/26/2001 01:31 PM From: Tana Jones on 02/20/2001 11:37 AM
